title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS backed by $85M+ and trusted by brands like The New York Times and Wiz, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale its GTM operational backbone. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech focus aligns perfectly with Finout's domain, deep Salesforce/RevOps expertise directly applicable, and experience scaling revenue operations at high-growth companies matches the $30M+ ARR scaling mandate. Remote-first arrangement with Tel Aviv HQ collaboration fits location preferences.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and immediately thought of you—your track record scaling GTM operations in fintech SaaS directly mirrors what they're building post-$85M funding. Having navigated the exact complexity of aligning Sales, Marketing, and Finance across high-growth B2B companies, you'd be instrumental in operationalizing their next revenue inflection, especially with the Tel Aviv collaboration angle playing to your strengths and location flexibility.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue intelligence leader, seeks a RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations to accelerate revenue growth through data-driven territory design and consultative partnership with business leaders. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM planning; deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, sales territories, and segmentation; strong analytical skills in Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool); and Salesforce proficiency. Experience with territory tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan is a plus.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, Salesforce proficiency, and territory/pipeline forecasting skills directly align with this role's core requirements. Gong's revenue intelligence platform and GTM focus are ideal for a senior RevOps executive seeking a strategic operational leadership position.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building RevOps programs that tie territory design and sales strategy to predictable revenue outcomes, and Gong's revenue intelligence platform resonates deeply with how I think about data-driven GTM. I'd be excited to explore how my background in Salesforce administration, pipeline forecasting, and sales operations could help you accelerate territory strategy execution across your organization.

title: RevOps Systems Manager
description: Actabl, a hospitality-tech SaaS serving 10,000+ properties, seeks a RevOps Systems Manager responsible for administration, optimization, and strategic oversight of Salesforce and other RevOps tools. The ideal candidate has Salesforce Advanced Administrator and App Builder certifications, 5+ years of hands-on Salesforce administration managing complex orgs independently, and experience integrating tools like Outreach, Gong, PandaDoc, ZoomInfo, and LinkedIn Sales Navigator. Strong SOQL proficiency and a data-driven mindset are essential for driving efficiency across revenue teams.
score_reason: Strong technical Salesforce fit with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience and demonstrated RevOps expertise. However, this is a systems administration specialist role rather than a strategic leadership position, placing it below Omri's target seniority level (Head of RevOps) despite excellent technical alignment.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations infrastructure in B2B SaaS, with deep hands-on Salesforce admin experience managing complex multi-tool ecosystems. I noticed Actabl's RevOps Systems Manager role and the integration complexity you're managing across Outreach, Gong, PandaDoc, and ZoomInfo—that's exactly the technical stack I've orchestrated to drive pipeline efficiency at scale.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Nooks, an AI Sales Assistant Platform that automates sales busywork and is loved by teams at HubSpot and Rippling, seeks its first GTM Engineer to serve as the technical co-pilot for its Sales Development organization. Backed by $70M+ from top VCs including Kleiner Perkins, Nooks has grown ARR 4x then 3x. The role owns setup, optimization, and enablement within the Nooks platform, ideal for someone technical who thrives in a fast-growth B2B SaaS environment.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's RevOps/GTM expertise and technical platform optimization background. AI-native GTM, B2B SaaS, and first GTM Engineer role at a well-funded, fast-growth company are all strong fits; only minor gap is this being slightly more technical/platform-focused than pure RevOps strategy.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Nooks and immediately thought of you—an AI Sales Assistant platform automating sales workflows is exactly the kind of AI-native GTM motion you've been building toward. With your 15+ years optimizing go-to-market in B2B SaaS and platform expertise, you'd be perfectly positioned as Nooks' first GTM Engineer to scale their SDR org. Given HubSpot and Rippling are already using it and you've got that rare combination of revenue operations strategy + technical platform fluency, I'd love to explore if this 4x growth story resonates with you.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Pylon seeks a GTM Engineer to test, implement, and optimize AI outbound solutions from setup through performance tuning. Responsibilities include building automated outbound sequences with high deliverability, owning email infrastructure (domain health, warming strategies), creating data pipelines between marketing tools, CRM, and sales tooling, and collaborating with RevOps on lead scoring and routing. Requires 3+ years in marketing operations or GTM/growth engineering at B2B SaaS companies, with strong technical skills around APIs and webhooks.
score_reason: Strong alignment with GTM Engineer role leveraging RevOps expertise, AI-native GTM focus, and technical infrastructure skills (email deliverability, data pipelines, CRM/marketing tool integration). Remote location is ideal. Only minor gap: role emphasizes marketing ops depth vs. broader revenue operations leadership, but well within wheelhouse.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building GTM engines at B2B SaaS scale, and Pylon's approach to AI outbound automation caught my attention. I've architected email infrastructure, lead scoring models, and data pipelines between Salesforce/HubSpot and outbound tools—exactly the infrastructure challenges you're solving. I'd be interested in exploring how my RevOps background could accelerate your GTM Engineer function.

title: GTM Engineer

title: GTM Engineer

score_reason: Perfect alignment with Omri's GTM/RevOps expertise and AI-native systems experience. B2B SaaS enterprise platform with clear need for revenue operations infrastructure and intelligent automation—exactly his wheelhouse.

title: Senior Marketing Operations Specialist
description: Leadr, an AI-powered leadership development SaaS, seeks a Senior Marketing Operations Specialist to own and scale the marketing engine behind its growth. The role builds and maintains the systems, processes, and data foundation enabling a lean marketing team to drive revenue impact. Requires 3+ years in marketing or revenue operations (ideally B2B SaaS), experience building and scaling marketing systems in startups, hands-on AI tool implementation across GTM workflows, and deep CRM/marketing automation knowledge. title: Marketing Operations Lead
description: Hired, a talent marketplace matching tech and sales talent with top companies, seeks a Marketing Operations Lead within its Revenue Operations and Enablement team to drive execution of B2B marketing and sales campaigns. Responsibilities include managing Marketo, lead routing, account and lead scoring, attribution modeling, and defining the marketing operations technology roadmap. Requires 3+ years of B2B marketing experience in marketing operations or demand generation, with strong Marketo and Salesforce skills; experience with Full Circle, LeanData, and Datafox is a plus.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's RevOps/GTM expertise, B2B SaaS background, and marketing operations focus. Role matches his core strengths in lead routing, attribution, and marketing tech stack, though the 3+ year requirement is below his 15+ year seniority level.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Hired's Marketing Operations Lead role and thought of you immediately—your 15+ years building revenue operations infrastructure in B2B SaaS aligns perfectly with their need to scale lead routing, attribution, and marketing ops technology. title: Product Operations Manager
